name: air
description: AIR: Autonomous Implement & Review — lightweight protocol for small features from GitHub Issues. Project-local override: this is a Python/uv repo (package in jaleesbench/), so the implement-phase checks run uv/pytest instead of npm.

pre-spawn.comment-on-issue: On it! Implementing this feature now.

phases.name: Implement
phases.description: Implement the feature and add tests

tests.description: Offline test suite (uv/pytest). Python has no separate build step; pytest collection exercises imports.

phases.name: Create PR
phases.description: Create pull request with review in PR body

pr_exists.command: gh pr list --state all --head "$(git branch --show-current)" --json number --jq 'length' | grep -q '^[1-9]'
pr_exists.description: PR must be created before signaling completion

e2e_tests.command: echo 'no e2e suite configured for this repo'
e2e_tests.description: No end-to-end suite in this repo

TOO_COMPLEX.description: Feature is too complex for AIR, escalate to ASPIR
